title: これ、スタックしている？ • 現在タスクは thin-core を維持したまま drift 耐性と自動反 映を次段まで進めること として扱います。まず現行の lane 可 用性を current-run で確認し、6 本の active lane を立てて から実装に入ります。 • Spawned Feynman [reviewer] └ [phase:plan] [family:layering] [provider_hint:codex] Current task: continue Kernel hardening without increasing always-loaded con...
summary_text: Findings: 1. `run-local-orchestration` still masks non-zero `run-linked-systems` exits: **Yes**. `linked_rc` is only translated into `linked_status`/`linked_note` and not propagated as process exit ([run-local-orchestration.sh#L1065](/Users/masayuki/Dev/agent-orchestration/scripts/local/run-local-orchestration.sh#L1065), [run-local-orchestration.sh#L1068](/Users/masayuki/Dev/agent-orchestration/scripts/local/run-local-orchestration.sh#L1068), [run-local-orchestration.sh#L1072](/Users/masayuki/Dev/agent-orchestration/scripts/local/run-local-orchestration.sh#L1072)). This is now inconsistent with `run-linked-systems`, which exits with fail-closed codes ([run-linked-systems.sh#L250](/Users/masayuki/Dev/agent-orchestration/scripts/local/run-linked-systems.sh#L250), [run-linked-systems.sh#L337](/Users/masayuki/Dev/agent-orchestration/scripts/local/run-linked-systems.sh#L337)). 2. Scan-mode lock contention in `run-kernel-task-completion-backup` still returns 0: **Yes**. Default scan path still does `acquire_lock 0 || exit 0` ([run-kernel-task-completion-backup.sh#L209](/Users/masayuki/Dev/agent-orchestration/scripts/local/run-kernel-task-completion-backup.sh#L209)). Only explicit-record lock contention is fail-closed (`75`) ([run-kernel-task-completion-backup.sh#L167](/Users/masayuki/Dev/agent-orchestration/scripts/local/run-kernel-task-completion-backup.sh#L167)). 3. Minimal missing regression tests after current fixes: - `run-linked-systems` exit-contract test for adapter `rc=75` => script `rc=75` + `status=blocked`, and adapter `rc!=0,!=75` => script `rc=70` + `status=error`. Current linked tests are comment-policy only ([test-linked-systems-comment-policy.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/agent-orchestration/tests/test-linked-systems-comment-policy.sh), [test-linked-systems-comment-opt-in.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/agent-orchestration/tests/test-linked-systems-comment-opt-in.sh)). - Parent propagation test in `run-local-orchestration`: with `WITH_LINKED_SYSTEMS=true` and failing linked adapter, parent runner must return non-zero (at least one blocked/error case). Current parent linked test checks only comment opt-in ([test-local-orchestration-gates.sh#L415](/Users/masayuki/Dev/agent-orchestration/tests/test-local-orchestration-gates.sh#L415)). - Scan-mode lock contention test in backup runner: pre-create scan lock and run default scan path, assert non-zero blocked contract (currently tests cover explicit record lock and explicit queue-on-scan-lock only: [test-kernel-task-completion-backup.sh#L225](/Users/masayuki/Dev/agent-orchestration/tests/test-kernel-task-completion-backup.sh#L225), [test-kernel-task-completion-backup.sh#L246](/Users/masayuki/Dev/agent-orchestration/tests/test-kernel-task-completion-backup.sh#L246)).
